body.zh-TW:
## 前置需求
- Node.js 20+、Python 3.11+
- PostgreSQL 17（含 pgvector extension）

## 資料庫初始化
```bash
psql -U postgres -c "CREATE DATABASE memtrace;"
psql -U postgres -d memtrace -f schema/sql/001_init.sql
```

## 環境變數（packages/api/.env）
```
DATABASE_URL=postgresql://postgres:password@localhost/memtrace
SECRET_KEY=<random-32-chars>
GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID=<optional>
GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET=<optional>
GOOGLE_REDIRECT_URI=http://localhost:8000/auth/google/callback
```

## 啟動服務
```bash
# 安裝 TS 相依
npm install

# 安裝 Python 相依
cd packages/api && pip install -r requirements.txt

# 終端 1：FastAPI
cd packages/api && uvicorn main:app --reload --port 8000

# 終端 2：Vite 前端（proxy 已設定至 localhost:8000）
cd packages/ui && npm run dev
```
body.en:
## Prerequisites
- Node.js 20+, Python 3.11+
- PostgreSQL 17 (with pgvector extension)

## Database Init
```bash
psql -U postgres -c "CREATE DATABASE memtrace;"
psql -U postgres -d memtrace -f schema/sql/001_init.sql
```

## Environment Variables (packages/api/.env)
```
DATABASE_URL=postgresql://postgres:password@localhost/memtrace
SECRET_KEY=<random-32-chars>
GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID=<optional>
GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET=<optional>
GOOGLE_REDIRECT_URI=http://localhost:8000/auth/google/callback
```

## Start Services
```bash
# Install TS dependencies
npm install

# Install Python dependencies
cd packages/api && pip install -r requirements.txt

# Terminal 1: FastAPI
cd packages/api && uvicorn main:app --reload --port 8000

# Terminal 2: Vite frontend (proxy pre-configured to localhost:8000)
cd packages/ui && npm run dev
```
